description: Claude Code Fable acts as the orchestrator: it researches the request, creates markdown goal and work-plan state, delegates implementation/review/improvement to codex-design-and-implement-review-loop, then verifies completion and repeats while actionable TODOs remain.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start with the Fable goal-and-plan step. That step researches the request, writes markdown goal and work-plan state, and decides the first Codex delegation. Package the latest Fable markdown state for codex-design-and-implement-review-loop. After Codex returns, summarize the delegated result, then have Fable verify whether the original goal is complete. If Fable reports needs_replan, return to goal-and-plan to revise the markdown state. If Fable reports needs_todo, package those TODOs for another Codex design-and-implement-review-loop run. Finish only when Fable reports no remaining blocking TODOs.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep the Fable markdown goal, markdown plan, delegated Codex workflow inputs, delegated results, completion decision, TODOs, verification evidence, changed files, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Use Claude Code Fable to research the request, maintain markdown goal state, and create or revise the work plan.
Package the current Fable goal, plan, constraints, and remaining TODOs for codex-design-and-implement-review-loop.
Summarize the delegated Codex implementation, review, and improvement result for Fable verification.
Use Claude Code Fable to verify goal completion and decide whether to replan, delegate remaining TODOs, or finish.
Publish the accepted Fable goal, markdown plan, Codex evidence, verification, changed files, residual risks, and final status.

rielaPackage.title: fable-and-improve
rielaPackage.description: Claude Code Fable researches and plans in markdown, delegates implementation/review/improvement to codex-design-and-implement-review-loop, and loops until Fable verifies completion.
